description: Customer forgot their MowerConnect app password and was locked out of the mobile app.
resolution: Sent a password reset link and the customer confirmed they regained access. No further contact needed.

description: The app would not pair with the mower over wifi after the customer upgraded their phone.
resolution: Walked the customer through re-pairing in app settings and the connection was restored.

description: A firmware update for the robotic mower kept failing at about 40 percent.
resolution: Cleared the app cache and re-ran the software update over a stable wifi connection; firmware installed successfully.

description: Customer account was locked after several failed login attempts.
resolution: Verified the customer's identity and unlocked the account; advised using a password manager.

description: The mower left streaks of uncut grass along one edge of the lawn.
resolution: Adjusted the cutting height and the overlap setting and advised a seasonal blade replacement.

description: Customer reported that the blade disc detached during operation and caused a minor injury to their foot. They mentioned contacting a lawyer.
resolution: Logged a safety incident and escalated; advised the customer their representative should contact our legal team.

description: Customer was double charged for an annual subscription and escalated to a manager demanding a refund.
stakeholders: and a manager approved a goodwill credit.

description: Unit arrived dead on arrival; customer wants a warranty replacement and a refund of the shipping cost.
resolution: Issued an RMA for the defective unit and a shipping credit through billing.

description: Customer submitted a formal data deletion request citing GDPR and asked what personal data we hold.
resolution: Acknowledged the request and routed it to compliance for handling within the legal window.

description: Customer asked about trade-in pricing to upgrade to a larger-area mower model.
resolution: Provided current upgrade pricing and a trade-in quote; customer is considering it.

description: Same customer reported the app crashed on opening right after the latest update.
resolution: Reinstalled the app and the crash was resolved; confirmed normal operation. No further contact.
